scripts.doctor:launch: npm --prefix backend run doctor:launch && npm --prefix web run doctor:launch && npm --prefix mobile run doctor:launch
scripts.doctor:production: npm --prefix backend run doctor:production && npm --prefix web run doctor:production && npm --prefix mobile run doctor:production
scripts.release:verify: npm run verify:launch && npm run backup:verify
scripts.release:production-check: npm run doctor:production && npm run backup:verify
scripts.release:check: npm run verify:launch && npm run doctor:production && npm run backup:verify
scripts.audit:launch: npm run audit:backend && npm run audit:web:high && npm run audit:mobile
scripts.verify: npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:web && npm run verify:mobile
scripts.verify:launch: npm run verify && npm run verify:e2e && npm run doctor:launch && npm run audit:launch
